title: Product Tagline
scenario: Create a catchy product tagline for a new eco-friendly laundry detergent that emphasizes the importance of sustainability. The target output should be a phrase that is under 5 words and uses alliteration.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the tagline meet the word count and alliteration requirements?
Is the tagline original and creative?
Does the tagline convey a positive and uplifting tone?
